message:
feat(fp-frame): add SeriesGroupBy.agg, reindex_columns, from_tuples

- SeriesGroupBy::agg(funcs): multi-function aggregation returning DataFrame
- DataFrame::reindex_columns: reorder/filter/add columns with NaN fill
- DataFrame::from_tuples: row-oriented constructor with column names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
